reasoning: On August 3, the Wikipedia page still reflected the July 2025 FIDE rating list, where Levon Aronian is ranked 15th. In standard FIDE play during July, Aronian lost a match against Wei Yi, losing 5 rating points. News reports confirm that among the top 20, only Wei Yi and Aronian had rating changes for the August 2025 rating list. Aronian's rating drop from 2742 to 2737 puts him below Fedoseev (2739) and Dominguez Perez (2738), dropping his official rank to 17th. It is highly likely that Wikipedia will be updated to reflect the August list by the first resolution date (August 10), so his ranking will be posted as 17th. Since 17 is not 'as high or higher' (meaning 1 to 15) than his August 3 ranking (15), the August 10 and September 2 outcomes are very likely to resolve NO. There is a gradual increase in uncertainty for the distant resolution dates, as Aronian could regain his rating points and climb back into the top 15 by late 2025 or early 2026. Therefore, probabilities increase towards 0.5 over time.
